title: Verify user can set reminder from Trial Corner
description: Test that user can enable the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle and system records this preference
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner page

steps.description: 3. Click on 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle
4. Toggle should turn to ON state

expected_result: Toggle is enabled, reminder-me-clicked event is fired with page source 'trial corner', and confirmation message is shown
